name: Arcane Archer of the Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>深</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>緑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い
desc: While there is a Plant-Type monster on your side of the field, this card cannot be attacked. By Tributing 1 Plant-Type monster on your side of the field, destroy 1 Spell or Trap Card on the field.
mnst_eff: While there is a Plant-Type monster on your side of the field, this card cannot be attacked. By Tributing 1 Plant-Type monster on your side of the field, destroy 1 Spell or Trap Card on the field.
